python -c 
import urllib.request
import os

output_dir = 'tasks/t0002_baseline_evaluation/assets/paper/10.1109_ASRU65441.2025.11434797/files'
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
out_file = os.path.join(output_dir, 'ayache_2024_whisperner-joint-asr-ner.pdf')

if os.path.exists(out_file) and os.path.getsize(out_file) > 10000:
    print(f'File already exists: {out_file} ({os.path.getsize(out_file)} bytes)')
else:
    url = 'https://arxiv.org/pdf/2409.08107'
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (research paper download)'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp:
        data = resp.read()
    with open(out_file, 'wb') as f:
        f.write(data)
    print(f'Downloaded {len(data)} bytes to {out_file}')
    # Validate
    assert data[:4] == b'%PDF', f'Not a PDF: {data[:20]}'
    assert b'%%EOF' in data[-1000:] or b'%%EOF' in data[-2000:], 'Missing EOF marker'
    print('Validation passed: valid PDF with EOF marker')
